workspaceContext.emptyTitle: Tell every agent about this workspace
workspaceContext.emptyDescription: The company, the product, the customers. Loaded into every new chat in this workspace.
workspaceContext.helper: Shared by every agent in this workspace. Loaded into each new chat. Agents can update this when you tell them something new.
workspaceContext.placeholder: e.g. Acme Corp, B2B fintech, Series A. Customers are CFOs at mid-market companies.

userContext.emptyDescription: Your role, what you care about, how you like to work. Loaded into every new chat in this workspace.
userContext.helper: Loaded into each new chat in this workspace. Agents can update this when you tell them something new.
userContext.placeholder: e.g. I'm Juan, head of sales. I care about pipeline velocity and prefer short replies.

provider.title: AI provider
provider.description: Houston uses <emph>your own</emph> subscription. We never see your credentials.

connectPhone.title: Connect phone
connectPhone.description: Scan this code to manage Houston from your phone. The same code keeps working as long as this computer is on and Houston is open.
connectPhone.loading: Getting ready to connect your phone…
connectPhone.connectingStatus: Connecting to the phone service. This usually takes a few seconds.
connectPhone.keepComputerAwake: Keep this computer awake while you use Houston on your phone.
connectPhone.alwaysOnHint: For 24/7 access, <emph>Always On</emph> runs Houston on our servers.

errors.noInternet: Houston needs an internet connection the first time you open the app. Please connect and reopen Houston to enable phone pairing.
errors.generic: Couldn't prepare a pairing code. Please try again.

reset.title: Disconnect all phones
reset.description: Resets the QR and signs out every phone currently connected to this computer.
reset.confirmDescription: This resets the QR and signs out every phone currently connected to this computer. Scan the new QR to connect again.

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.description: Used when your routines fire, 9am means 9am in this zone.
timezone.label: IANA zone

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.description: Permanently delete this workspace and all its agents.
dangerZone.createAnotherFirst: Create another workspace first before deleting this one.
dangerZone.confirmDescription: This will permanently delete this workspace and all its agents. This cannot be undone.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Run Houston without touching the mouse.

reportBug.title: Report bug
reportBug.intro: Tell us what went wrong. We'll send your message along with the logs from your last activity so we can see what happened.
reportBug.timingTip: We only get the most recent activity, so send the report as soon as the bug happens for the most useful info.
reportBug.toastEquivalence: This is the same as tapping Report bug on the red error notification, you don't need to send both.
reportBug.label: What happened?
reportBug.placeholder: Describe the bug. What were you doing, what did you expect, what happened instead?

toasts.successBody: Mission control is on it, deploying a fix.
toasts.successBodyWithId: Mission control is on it, deploying a fix. Reference: {{id}}
